Name: Heartrot Crypt
Note: A sprawling necropolis built within a labyrinthine network of catacombs. Its halls are lined with countless alcoves, each housing the remains of the departed, while the distant sound of rattling bones fills the air.

Name: Thunwasp Cemetery
Note: A foreboding necropolis perched atop a jagged cliff, overlooking a desolate wasteland. Its towering walls harbor restless spirits, and the imposing gates bear the marks of countless battles and ancient curses.

Name: Vebironcrus Necropolis
